message:
fix(ui,search): update ftui mouse API and minor formatting cleanup

Two changes:

1. src/ui/app.rs — Migrate from deprecated `config.mouse = true` boolean
   field to the new `MouseCapturePolicy` enum API introduced in a recent
   ftui update. The old boolean `mouse` field has been replaced by
   `mouse_capture_policy` which takes a `MouseCapturePolicy` enum value.
   This commit sets it to `MouseCapturePolicy::On`, which is the direct
   equivalent of the previous `true` value, preserving the same runtime
   behavior (mouse events are captured in the fullscreen TUI). The
   corresponding `use ftui::runtime::MouseCapturePolicy` import is added
   at the top of the function scope.

2. src/search/hash_embedder.rs — Remove a trailing blank line before the
   closing brace of the `impl HashEmbedder` block. Pure whitespace /
   formatting cleanup with no behavioral change.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
